textPlain: Love this, will take a look.  Good luck on your open source journey.
Interesting post, minor note on the homepage: The first two boxes for "Trusted by" above software.com are shown as empty for me.Browser is Firefox on Android, tested without adblocker

I genuinely thought software.com was like a lorem ipsum placeholder (particularly in the context of the other two being blank). Went to the site ... it feels even more like a fake company. There is so much here but it all feels like an empty shell?
